name: liquid-lab-product-finder
description: Block-based filter widget that submits to a Shopify-native collection filter URL — zero JavaScript. Up to 6 filter dropdowns per section, each backed by a tag, vendor, or metafield (filter.p.tag, filter.p.vendor, filter.p.m.{namespace}.{key}). Manual options entered by the merchant as Label|value lines in a textarea. Card-style container with full UI Element Settings Standard coverage: §8.2 typography for heading/subheading/labels, §8.3 button settings (with all five hover effects + full-width toggle), §8.4 card (bg, border, radius, shadow, padding mobile/desktop), §8.6 section background (color, opacity, gradient), §8.8 layout (vertical_stack vs horizontal_row fields, card_align, card_max_width), §8.9 universal (hide_on_mobile/desktop, section_width, custom_css). Independent field styling block: bg, text, border color/width/radius, padding, focus color. Reusable snippet (snippets/liquid-lab-product-finder.liquid) with parameter-based interface — pre-wired for #13 liquid-lab-hero-with-finder via the context parameter ('standalone' MVP, 'overlay' for the hero). Touch-target 44px min on selects and submit. focus-visible 3px box-shadow ring on selects + 2px outline on submit. Three Dark/Warm/Bold presets with realistic seeded blocks (Category/Brand/Price for Dark, Skin type/Concern/Routine step for Warm, Style/Size/Color for Bold).
